steps.t: Hata Kebir can be found due east of Aerthir in south-eastern Lebennin. Jajax has asked you to aid him in fighting against the Heirs of Castamir at Hat…
Erchar can be found in Linhir along the Gilrain in western Lebennin. Jajax has decided to remain with his brother until you are able to rally the forc…
